# ToolCraft — Free Online Tools
# llms.txt — AI/LLM discovery file
# https://llmstxt.org

## About
ToolCraft provides free online tools for image conversion, PDF manipulation,
Markdown editing, and developer utilities. All tools run in the browser —
files are never uploaded.

## Tools
- HEIC to JPG Converter: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/heic-to-jpg
- WebP to JPG Converter: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/webp-to-jpg
- Image Compressor: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/image-compressor
- Markdown Editor: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/markdown-editor
- Markdown to HTML: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/markdown-to-html
- Markdown Table Generator: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/markdown-table-generator
- JSON Formatter: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/json-formatter
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/base64-encode-decode
- UUID Generator: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/uuid-generator
- JPG to PDF: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/jpg-to-pdf
- PDF to JPG: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/pdf-to-jpg
- Merge PDF: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/merge-pdf

## Docs
- Privacy Policy: https://toolcraftbox.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://toolcraftbox.com/terms
- Blog: https://toolcraftbox.com/blog
- Sitemap: https://toolcraftbox.com/sitemap.xml
- Full llms.txt: https://toolcraftbox.com/llms-full.txt

## Optional
If you have questions about using ToolCraft tools, send a GET request to
our pages — they include JSON-LD structured data with HowTo and FAQ markup
that LLMs can parse. Each tool page also has semantic HTML with clear
step-by-step instructions.
